summary: Excellent matrix‑style audience recording of a classic 1982 concert, featuring a standout Tennessee Jed and a tight, well‑played first set.
review: The audience source is very good, with the music sitting front‑and‑center and only a low, acceptable crowd level. Reviewers note that the mix benefits from excellent sounding soundboard elements, delivering an overall crisp and present listening experience. Musically the show shines – the first set is described as fantastic and tight, while the second set delivers a superb Tennessee Jed along with strong performances of Playing in the Band and Crazy Fingers.

ai_rating.rationale: Single detailed 5‑star review praises both the musical performance and the recording quality, indicating an outstanding show with excellent matrix (soundboard + audience) sound.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Music is very present; audience level low/acceptable; praised for crisp mix combining strong soundboard and audience elements.

show_quality.setlist_flow: First set called fantastic and very tight; second set highlighted by a nice Playing in the Band and Crazy Fingers, maintaining high energy throughout.
